text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking the academy grounds when I
spot Tokai Teio. She seems to be searching for
something.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sort of? It's kind of complicated...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Huh? It's not here either... And she said she
already looked there...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she twirled her pen so hard it flew like a
propeller up into a tree... All right! I'll take a look!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Stooop! What do you mean, "All right," Tsuru?!
Why are you trying to climb that tree?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Teio! One of the younger students said she
lost her pen, so I was helping her find it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Tsuru always helps friends in need, which is great,
but she gets weird ideas in her head sometimes. I
can't just leave her on her own.
choice_data_list:
Huh? Speaking of, where did Tsurumaru
Tsuyoshi go?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I did a quick run around the building, but no luck!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
O-oh... Oh dear... I-I feel another dizzy spell
coming on!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're working yourself way too hard!
Come on, focus on your breathing for a bit,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ah... Haha! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
It's just that, if I see a younger student in need, I
want to do what I can! Go that extra minute for
them, you know?

I think you mean "go that extra mile." But I admire
your desire to do your utmost.

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text:
Prez?!
President Rudolf?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to join the search. After all, is it not the
duty of a senior student to help their juniors when
they need it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We were heading back to the student council
office to sign off on some documents, but they'll
hold until tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If it's the job of senior students to help their
juniors, then it's the job of a trainer to support
the students.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone! I can't tell you how grateful
I am that you went so far to help me!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
That pen is suuuuper important to you, isn't it?
Keep it close from now on, okay? Bye...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Cough, hack! O-oof. Talk about ruining the mood!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Aww, you don't have to beat yourself up. The way
she was cradling that pen... I'm pretty sure she got
your message!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Trust me—I'm a super genius with a mind as sharp
as a knife, so I know what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you think? Oh, what am I saying, you're
right! Thanks, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just that I'm blinded by the light of their
forthrightness.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They saw a student in need and lent a hand,
working together to solve the problem.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This academy is blessed to have so many
kindhearted students and trainers...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I got a glimpse of the bright future
ahead.
choice_data_list: This encounter taught me a lesson as well.
This encounter taught me a lesson as well.
I hope I can see that bright future unfold soon.
I hope I can see that bright future unfold soon.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I got a glimpse of the bright future
ahead.
choice_data_list: This encounter taught me a lesson as well.
This encounter taught me a lesson as well.
I hope I can see that bright future unfold soon.
I hope I can see that bright future unfold soon.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We're of the same mind. I, too, gleaned much
from this experience. I owe them both.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text:
You bet!
Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I couldn't agree more.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did I hear you say it's still bright enough to
run? Are we going for a run now?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, yeah! I'm also ready to run, since I always
stay on top of my stretches!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha! Well then, who am I to refuse?
